markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the company restructure and strategize for the challenging HX client.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New "Client Enablement" Role:** The new role, managing \~8 clients, is viable if editorial execution is fully delegated and leadership provides capacity support for high-maintenance accounts like HX.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [**HX Client Blocked:** The HX client is stalled by David's lack of strategic engagement and rejection of core underwriting topics, which he deems too "AI-written" for his "thought leadership" vision.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [**HX Intervention Plan:** For tomorrow's meeting, Bailey will prepare a themed content proposal to secure a one-month approval. Jakub will then intervene to enforce a strategic focus and unblock the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [**Reporting Training:** Jakub will train Bailey on monthly reporting, starting with a walkthrough of the Relay report next week, using existing reports from Jessalyn's clients as a baseline.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

## Topics

### Company Restructure & New Role

  - [**New Structure:** One person will own the full editorial pipeline per client to fix current inefficiencies from split ownership.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [**Bailey’s Concern:** A specific CM (Kelvin) may not be ready for this expanded responsibility.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [**Jakub’s Assessment:** The new "Client Enablement" role (managing \~8 clients) is viable.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Jakub previously managed 14 clients by splitting duties with MEs.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
      - [**Critical Dependencies:**](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
        1.  [**Editorial Layer:** Must be fully trusted to execute strategy with minimal oversight.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
        2.  [**Leadership Support:** Must provide capacity support for high-maintenance clients (e.g., HX) to prevent burnout.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
      - [**Key Insight:** The primary risk is not the client load, but the potential for a weak editorial layer to cause churn, as seen in past experiences.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)

### HX Client Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The HX client is stalled by David's lack of strategic engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
      - [**Blocker:** David won't approve topics, preferring async line edits on completed articles.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
      - [**Rejection:** David rejected core underwriting topics, viewing them as "AI-written" and not "thought leadership."](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [**Solution:** A two-part intervention for tomorrow's meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
      - [**Bailey’s Prep:** Create a one-month content proposal organized by themes, not a full calendar, to secure a high-level strategic approval.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
      - [**Jakub’s Role:** Intervene to enforce a strategic focus.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Explain that SEO requires matching user intent (SERP structure) to rank, and thought leadership is best injected within that framework.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
          - [**Goal:** Secure a one-month commitment to the approved plan to unblock the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
  - [**PSEO Pipeline:** David will likely ask for an update; Jakub will prepare a response.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### Reporting & Strategy Training

  - [**Goal:** Train Bailey on monthly reporting and strategic analysis for the new role.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [**Method:** Jakub will schedule 15-minute walkthroughs of reports for Bailey's clients, explaining the "why" behind the data.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [**Baseline:** Bailey can review existing reports from Jessalyn's clients (Webstacks, Chiro, Flossum) to see the format.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [**First Walkthrough:** The Relay report, due the last week of November.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)

### Other Client Updates

  - [**Relay:** Awaiting CTAs, but the team has sufficient runway.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
  - [**Logic:** Rolling out new blog post workflows; Bailey will share an example and create a Linear ticket for a pipeline step after testing.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [**Client Scoring:** Jakub will send the scoring template to Bailey mid-week for feedback on newer clients.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
      - [Prepare the themed one-month content proposal for the HX meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
      - [Share HX context with Jakub before the meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
      - [Review existing monthly reports from Webstacks, Chiro, and Flossum.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [Share a Logic workflow example with Jakub.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
      - [Provide feedback on the client scoring template by mid-week.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
  - [**Jakub:**](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
      - [Prepare talking points for the HX meeting, focusing on strategic alignment and the PSEO pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
      - [Schedule a 15-minute walkthrough of the Relay report with Bailey.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
      - [Send the client scoring template to Bailey.](https://fathom.video/share/8NJbUTwViHsustGBtZ4CprK2YfwL_P5c?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
